name: testask-ai
description: TestASK AI — Intelligent AI-Powered Question Bank & Assessment Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
